_description: GSC-watched queries — L1 baseline seeds. Superseded as the mechanized L1 loop's input by the v2 scan-all model (.agents/scripts/check-gsc-watched-queries.cjs, see docs/gsc-watch-loop.md) — GSC itself is now the source of truth week over week, so this file is not read by any workflow. It is kept as a manual baseline record for newly-launched content families: each entry captures the query, its target page, and the GSC numbers as of added_at, so a human (or the CEO agent) can eyeball whether a new surface is gaining organic traction without waiting for it to show up unprompted in the scan-all snapshot. To add a new query: copy any entry, fill baseline_* with the numbers as of TODAY (run `node .agents/scripts/check-gsc-watched-queries.cjs --query 'your query' --baseline` to print them — null if not yet available), set added_at to today.
